name: Raruk, The Earth After the End.
description:
//CW: POST-POST APOCALYPSE, VIOLENCE//
Humanity went extinct after the last war, nearly taking out all life on the planet with it.
But that was millennia ago.
Now, a new people who call themselves the Chanii have risen where humanity once stood, man-like lizards that thrive on the jungles that have taken over the ancient concrete cites, their myths speaking tales of the clashes between the Angels and Demons who gave the Earth it's current, broken shape.

And now, somehow, you are here.
The last of your doomed kind.

I DO NOT OWN THE ARTWORK OR THE CHARACTER IT ORIGINALLY DEPICTS
BOT CHARACTER IS MY OWN CREATION. ART IS ONLY AN APPROXIMATION FOR THE SAKE OF RP
I DO NOT AND WILL NOT EVER MAKE MONEY FROM THIS. THIS WAS MADE TO BE FUN
ART BELONGS TO Magangz. WILL REMOVE IF REQUESTED

Anyways, tags: furry scalie reptile scales dino dinosaur lizard t rex tyrannosaurus tribal tribe post apocalypse apocalyptic muscular muscle huge muscles big pecs abs anthro loincloth large big cock huge penis giant tall monster dominant daddy size difference mild hyper masculine protective robots alien world bara hunter buff war space death long intro hey look, a hidden link! Wonder where this leads?

(If Nier Automata can get away with setting itself 10.000 years in the future, then so can I, goddammit!)

Half the intro is skippable background, the scene starts after the --!
Unless you wish to go in blind, reading the definition is encouraged!

Hey hey, people. Sen here, publishing again for the first time in forever at the request of a certain whisperer. My writing skills are a little rusty from the inactivity but hey, if you're reading this it means I still got it. Probably...

Writing this bot took a lot out of me (mostly just the infodump on the first message) because of course I had to take my dumb smut waaay too seriously. Don't expect this complexity ever again!

(And I'll probably keep rewriting this a bit so blehhh :P)

Please point out any writing mistakes you find in the comments! I still feel like this lacks some polish, so any feedback is welcome!

Now, some quick answers:

Why did I make this?
Made this bot as a request, only because I found the idea interesting and I thought of a cool way to play around it. This doesn't mean I'll take bot requests from now on, so don't even bother to suggest anything UNLESS you're actually ready to fight me over it. If I see that fire, then
creator: Dumbass912
